subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! Thy letter was received and its contents were understood. Convey thou My greetings to the friends of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء مکتوب تو واصل گشت و مضمون معلوم گردید یاران الهی را تحیت
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @love of God, @fire and light; fire and water, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
